{{Quote|I thought Frego was a planet ruled by criminals.|[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]]|<ref name="TOW" />}}
'''Frego''' was a wealthy [[Planet/Legends|planet]] controlled by a crime ring led by the [[Cobral family]] since [[61 BBY/Legends|61 BBY]]. However, after [[Lena Cobral]] testified in front of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] in [[41 BBY/Legends|41 BBY]], exposing Cobral's patronage from Frego's [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Crote (Human)|Crote]], Frego started on the road to a new beginning. Nevertheless, the Cobral ring survived on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

The inhabitants of Frego were known as [[Fregan]]s.

{{Planet-stub}}
